case_title: DENIS SIERRA VS. SUBWAY ON JEFFERSON, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SIERRA, DENIS

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-30-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF DENIS SIERRA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
